name: Paper Lemon Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, cream the butter and sugar together until light and fluffy.
2. Add vanilla, lemon rind, and lemon juice to the mixture. Continue beating until smooth.
3. Sift flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt into another bowl.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
5. Turn dough out onto wax paper or plastic wrap. Form into rolls about 1 to 1-1/2 inches in diameter and about a foot long.
6. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or freeze until ready to use.
7. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Do not grease cookie sheets.
9. Cut the cooled rolls into 1/8 inch slices using a sharp knife. Place them about 3 inches apart on ungreased baking sheets.
10. Sprinkle with sugar, if desired. Bake for 7-8 minutes until lightly golden and crisp around the edges.
11. Remove from oven and let cool slightly on the sheets before transferring to wire racks to finish cooling.
